outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Hero, are you aware that it is very impolite to be late?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: …For our usual banter, of course.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: Have I kept you waiting?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I mean, I wasn’t paying attention to your presence or absence at all.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: It’s only that I had a question I wanted to inquire about. Nothing of extraordinary importance.

outputs.name: option0
outputs.value: What is it? I’m an open book

outputs.name: option1
outputs.value: Darling, you can ask me anything.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You know, in your little village, do you have some sort of… acquaintance?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Someone you’d want to spend your life beside.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: But in terms of dating, I don’t think I’m the first one people tend to find interesting.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I find that rather hard to believe, hero.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You can drop that facade of humility around me.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I’m very nice and people recognize that

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: But maybe I’m just not the person who they find the most attractive

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: And don't feel like I’m available, and that’s fine.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: But… don’t you feel the yearn to be desired?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: To have an external confirmation of your qualities?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: …Hero, I must tell you something I’ve been keeping on my chest.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: At first, when you said you wanted to charm me I was stunned.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: But it did well to my ego, and that was a feeling I could understand.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Now, there’s something completely different within my soul.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Having someone making an effort to make you happy is undeniably flattering

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: But that someone being you

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Being a mighty hero, I simply couldn’t understand.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Why were you doing this to me?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: And why did it matter that it was you?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You made me weak, and stronger at the same time.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I’m very nice and people recognize that

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: And that doesn’t make any sense, but at the same time

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: But… don’t you feel the yearn to be desired?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You reminded me of a feeling I had long forgotten, kindness.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: And not only do I want you to be kind to me

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: But, astonishingly, I want to be kind to you, in return.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: And I’d be kind to the world,

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: if it meant you’d like me more.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: If it'd meant you’d find me charming.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: If it made you stay.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: But now, the sin of greed consumes me deeply

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: And I found myself waiting to be more.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I want to be your favorite person.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You did it. Congratulations, hero.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Now please finish what you started, and stay by my side.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: And just like that, the unimaginable has happened.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: The Hero and the Boss started their own special relationship.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: It was difficult to get her friends from the village to accept him, but after a while, the citizens started letting their guard down, and the Boss even made friends, like he secretly dreamed of.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: However, his favorite person would always be his knight in shining armor.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: The two of them lived together at the castle and had a huge library, with many books to choose from.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: Even though not everything was completely perfect, they overpowered every single obstacle that’d come their way, and together, lived happily ever after.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: When she declined, the Boss didn’t cry, didn’t beg her to change her mind.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: He simply thanked her for listening and let her go.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: A few days later, the castle was abandoned, and the citizens wondered what happened so suddenly, why he’d given up from his evil master-plan, many speculate that the hero defeated him, but she always denied.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: Years fly by, and she decides to come back to the castle once more. She went through the salon they used to banter in, and just for a second, wondered how things would have been if she had accepted his confession.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: There was no use to think of that now.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: She was already with somebody else, whom she loved deeply.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: The Boss, nowhere to be found, became only a sweet memory, and she hoped with all her heart that wherever he was, he was happy.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: He simply thanked her for listening and let her go.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Hero, listen, we have to talk about it.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Why are you truly doing this?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Is this some sort of manipulation?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Are you trying to get me soft so you can defeat me easily?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: Do you seriously think I’d do that to someone?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: Do you seriously think I’d do that to someone?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I- Look, do you think it’s believable?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: That you are charmed by me?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: You can believe me or not.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I don’t have proof besides my words that I feel like I feel.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: But, still, I’d like you to believe me.
